features: GIFT BOX LIGHTS – Bring a luminous festive glow to your home with this set of 3 Metal Framed Gift Box Lights! The set includes a large box of 22 x 20 x 20cm, a medium size of 17 x 15 x 15cm, and a small box of 15 x 10 x 10cm.

CALMING GLOW – Featuring a total of 60 LEDs around their exterior, the boxes emanate a warm white light, and feature silver coloured ribbons. This results in a magical set of lights that complements any Christmas decorative set-up.

EASY SETUP – Place the frame lights in a variety of locations – their stable boxy structures allow them to stand freely, making them ideal for floors, especially as a decoration for Christmas tree bases. The lights are battery powered (3x AA required – not included), meaning no wires or sockets are necessary.

TIMER FUNCTION – Set the lights to automatically activate for a period of 6 hours in the evening, before turning off for 18 hours afterwards. This setting helps to save battery life and preserve the lights over a long period of time, while also offering you convenience.

CHRISTMAS WORKSHOP – The Christmas Workshop is the leading supplier of all things Christmas related. From Christmas trees & festive ornaments, to fairy lights and projector lights, you can find everything to decorate your home at the Christmas Workshop Amazon page.
description: Product Description Previous page Three Box Sizes A small, medium, and large box is included with every set, for versatile decorating opportunities. Authentic Touch Featuring a stylish bow on top of each box, these decorations are styled just like real presents. Timer Function The LEDs on the boxes can be set to activate for 6 hours, before turning off again to save battery. Easy Storage The different sizes of the boxes allow them to be stacked on top of each other, saving storage space Next page 1 Three Box Sizes 2 Authentic Touch 3 Timer Function 4 Easy Storage
